_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the user experience (e.g., decisionmaking, user design, and human-computer interaction) as it relates to AI systems.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI literacy concepts, including what AI is and is not, how ML models work at a conceptual level, AI limitations and failure modes, and responsible AI principles for non-technical audiences.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-004 (AG, cosine: 0.602), AI-K-010 (AI, cosine: 0.586).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.550). Shared vocabulary: [ai, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [computer, decisionmaking, design, experience, human, interaction] vs WIDAI-only terms [audiences, concepts, conceptual, failure, level, limitations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.869, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 32-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Knowledge of the user experience (e.g., decisionmaking, user design, and human-c" and "Knowledge of AI literacy concepts, including what AI is and is not, how ML model" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.608 > STS 0.550 (gap +0.058). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [ai, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [computer, decisionmaking, design, experience, human, interaction]. WIDAI-only: [audiences, concepts, conceptual, failure, level, limitations].
